sessions.title: Google Summit 2026.04
sessions.key_points: Google betas renamed to Search+/YouTube+/X-functional+. AI-MAX testing: 3 methods proposed (single campaign experiment recommended). Key concern: OCI keyword-level tracking compatibility with AI-MAX expanded matches. Smart Bidding Exploration: up to 19% more conversions. Search Partner Network re-enabled (was off since 2015). YouTube retargeting via channel audiences. Elasticity testing proposed. H1 performance: US exceeding goals by ~20%, EU mixed. OP1 forecasting tension: don't want to over-commit registrations.

notes: Richard was at Google Summit in Austin all week (Apr 8-9). No tasks completed today. Heavy meeting load with strategic content. Key themes: AI-MAX test design, paid app repositioning to traffic, LiveRamp enhanced match, OP1 planning tension.
